# Elounda Traditional Homes (traditional-homes.gr)

Purpose: Provide accurate, up-to-date information about our houses and villa in Elounda, Crete.
Preferred pages:
- /en/
- /en/houses/
- /en/villa/
- /en/location/
- /en/faq/
- /en/policies/
- /en/contact/

Data sources:
- Unit facts are defined in /en/houses/ pages and derived from on-site content.
- Images are referenced with alt text on each page.
